artifacts.title: Love receipt from 2026-02-15
artifacts.excerpt:
when i was doing improv comedy in nyc i had a buddy who was pursuing standup. we would workshop his jokes and i would go with him to open mics to record his sets for him.

one night he told me he had a real banger to end with. he said he was gonna do an impression of his dad but needed a volunteer from the audience. a guy got up there, however trepidatiously. my friend said alright, you're me, and I'm my dad, okay? the guy said okay...

then, my friend just left. left the room, left the venue. and did not come back. a few minutes went by of uncomfortable silence and scattered laughs. eventually, the volunteer goes "well, i guess he's not coming back," and the whole audience erupted in laughter and applause. the host came out to ask for one more round of applause for my friend before moving to the next comic. i slipped out to go and find him, he was somewhere down the street 🤣

this was i

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2026-02-18
artifacts.excerpt:
back in my youtube days I got a fb message from a girl in minnesota. she said she was a fan of my videos and was only sending the message because she was drunk, but wanted me to know that for the next hour, given the time difference, it was both of our birthdays (Jan 20/21). i found this delightful!

she was embarrassed the next day, but i was still delighted, and we became friends. some time later she and a friend of hers moved to nyc, so we got to meet! 

as many do, she had a series of unfortunate events happen once she got there, and we ended up inviting her to live with us. on a blow up mattress. quite literally in the middle of our big video production studio/apt.

that time period was so much fun, it’s really hard to describe. it was crazy how well we all got along and how much fun we had, she is the freakin BEST.

when i changed careers she was right by my side supporting me, she
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: time, first, every, now.

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2026-03-23
artifacts.excerpt:
I interviewed for a receptionist position at a big post-production house in nyc once, and I was brought in for a trial. It was not clear from what they said to me, however, that it was JUST a trial, they made it sound like I had the job. basically you work the whole day and then they tell you if you got it. AND I was working alongside the other girl up for the position (who seemed like a moron, so even though they did a bait and switch on me, I was still pretty confident I would get the job)

Nope.

They called me the next day to say I didn’t get it. I was devastated, but in time I reasoned that the office was kind of sterile and crazy. No phone or internet use allowed during work. I would have died.

I continued applying elsewhere.

it was crickets for the longest time, but then multiple interview offers came in on the same day!! in between interviews I grabbed a sandwich and popped a s
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: time, first, every, now.

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2026-04-09
artifacts.excerpt:
our 9 year old called a meeting with us last night and then laid out a plan she has to launch a game she’s building on steam. she has goals with dates attached and had clarity on the amount of money she would need and how she could potentially make it back. and even with that she wasn’t pie-in-the-sky about it, she knew she might not make any money.

she wasn’t asking us for the money yet but just wanted to make us aware of her plans and to make sure she had our support. my husband agreed and they continued chatting, but then she turned to me and said “daddy is on board, but do I have your support, too?”

I of course said yes, then continued listening to her tell us of her marketing plans amidst throwing astonished looks at my husband

I’m not surprised by this whole thing in general, but I was specifically surprised by the way she held court with us. the negotiation skill and the clarit
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: think, need, something, lot.
